name: Flavoured Oil for Stir Frying
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil gently for 5 minutes.
2. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
3. Transfer to a glass jar.
4. Cover tightly and refrigerate. Do not store at room temperature.
5. Use the flavored oil for stir-frying.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
